name: Piedmont Gold Exchange & Refinery
description_short: Charlotte-based precious metals and diamond broker with 32 years of experience buying/selling gold, silver, coins, and diamonds at competitive rates by eliminating middlemen.
description_long:
Piedmont Gold Exchange & Refinery has operated in the Carolinas for over 32 years, establishing itself as a established buyer and seller of precious metals, diamonds, and fine jewelry. The company is located in Pineville, NC (just south of Charlotte) and serves as both a retail seller and acquisition point for customers looking to liquidate valuables.

The company's core services include purchasing fine jewelry, gold, silver, platinum, diamonds, and rare coin collections at stated competitive rates. On the retail side, they offer bullion (gold, silver, and platinum coins and bars), rare coins, loose diamonds, and fine jewelry for sale. They are certified by Rapnet, a premier diamond market platform, which allows them to source diamonds globally and offer them at below-retail pricing. They also operate as a refinery, suggesting they process and purify precious metals.

Piedmont differentiates itself primarily through vertical integration—by cutting out middlemen in both buying and selling, they claim to pay customers more when acquiring items and sell retail goods for less. Their 32-year operational history and Rapnet certification provide credibility in a market where trust is essential. The company emphasizes their local roots in the Carolinas and positions themselves as a relationship-focused business.

As a pawn-shop and precious metals exchange, the business model depends on commodity price fluctuations and customer liquidity needs. While the website presents competitive advantages, actual buy/sell spreads and rates are not published online, requiring in-person or direct inquiry. The company operates limited weekend hours (closed Sundays, Saturday 10am-3pm only), which may inconvenience some customers. Like all precious metals dealers, they are subject to market volatility that affects pricing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 32 years of operating history in the Carolinas, suggesting established reputation and stability
Rapnet certification provides access to global diamond inventory and wholesale pricing
Vertical integration model (direct buyer and seller) eliminates middleman markups on both sides
Full-service offerings including jewelry, bullion, coins, diamonds, and refinery services in one location
Operates as both a seller (retail bullion/diamonds) and buyer (estate liquidation), providing flexibility
Published address and business hours provide physical location transparency
Explicitly states they source diamonds from 'world's premier diamond market' at below-retail prices
cons: Buy/sell rates and spreads not published online—customers must contact or visit to learn actual pricing
Limited weekend hours (Saturday only 10am-3pm, closed Sundays) may be inconvenient for working customers
Precious metals pricing is commodity-dependent and volatile; no price guarantees shown
Website lacks customer reviews, testimonials, or third-party ratings to verify service quality claims
No transparent appraisal or valuation process described; competitive advantage claims are unverified
best_for: Estate executors or individuals liquidating inherited jewelry, coins, or precious metals collections
Precious metals investors seeking to buy bullion, rare coins, or access global diamond inventory
Customers in the Charlotte/Pineville area with valuable jewelry or collections to sell for immediate cash
Individuals shopping for engagement diamonds or high-end jewelry at claimed below-retail pricing
diagnosis: Piedmont Gold Exchange is best for North Carolina residents with precious metals, diamonds, or jewelry to sell, or investors seeking bullion and rare coins at competitive pricing. Main caveat: actual buy/sell rates are not transparent online, so customers must visit or contact directly to verify pricing claims, and the company's stated competitive advantages (cutting out middlemen, below-retail diamond pricing) cannot be independently verified without direct quotes.
services: Gold, silver, and platinum coin and bar sales (bullion trading)
Rare coin sales and collections acquisition
Loose diamond sales with Rapnet global access
Diamond broker services certified by Rapnet
Estate jewelry and precious metals purchasing
Platinum, gold, and silver bullion inventory sales
Below-retail diamond sourcing from global markets
On-site valuations for precious metals and jewelry
Fine jewelry gift sales and customization (implied)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
